Her Story

Where Vision
Meets The Market

Arin Long is the founder of AMC — Ahy Money Club — a community built for traders who are serious about building wealth from the ground up. As the #2 educator for views on her platform and the first woman executive in her field, Arin is rewriting the rules of day trading education.

Her commodity trading strategy — Octane — is the first of its kind. A high-precision scalping method that has transformed the portfolios of over 1,000 students who came for the knowledge and stayed for the community.

AMC isn't just a brand. It's a movement. A Money Club where discipline meets opportunity, and every member holds a seat at the table.

OCTANE 
The First-of-Its-Kind Commodity Trading Strategy

Octane isn't just a method — it's a strategy. Built for speed, designed for precision, and proven in real markets. Arin's signature commodity strategy gives traders the edge to enter fast, exit clean, and protect their capital at every move.

⚡

Speed & Precision

Enter and exit in minutes using Arin's high-velocity commodity framework.

📊

Live Execution

Trade alongside Arin in real-time — learn by doing, not just watching.

🎯

Risk Management

Protect your capital while maximizing every opportunity the market gives you.

🏆

First of Its Kind

The only commodity scalping method of its kind — built from the ground up by Arin.

"The goal isn't just to trade — it's to trade with purpose, precision, and the confidence that comes from knowing exactly what you're doing."

— Arin Long · AMC · Ahy Money Club

Members Only

The Screening Room

This section is reserved for AMC members. Enter your access code to begin onboarding.

🎬

Members Only Access

Enter your AMC access code to unlock the screening room and begin your onboarding journey.

Incorrect code. Contact Arin for your access code.

Step 01 Welcome to Ahy Money Club

Welcome to AMC. You're now part of an elite community of traders learning the Octane Strategy — a first-of-its-kind commodity scalping strategy. This onboarding will get you fully set up and ready to trade alongside Arin.

Step 02 Download Your Apps

You'll need three platforms to follow along with AMC sessions. Download and create accounts on all three before your first class.

TradeLocker
Your primary trading platform. TradeLocker connects directly to your GenesisFX broker account and is where you'll execute all live trades using the Octane Strategy. Clean charts, fast execution, built for serious traders.
Download TradeLocker →
TradingView
The charting and analysis tool Arin uses during every session. Set up your free account and follow Arin's layout — you'll see the same setups, indicators, and timeframes she uses in real time during class.
Open TradingView (Arin's link) →
1House TV
The platform where all AMC content, replays, and live sessions are hosted. Download the 1House TV app and log in to access Arin's full course library, session replays, and bonus content exclusively for AMC members.
Open 1House TV →

Step 03 Set Up Your Broker & Demo Account

First get your GenesisFX account set up, then create your demo account in TradeLocker. No funding needed yet — this is all about getting your demo running so you can start practicing.

GenesisFX
01
Create Your GenesisFX Account
Sign up at GenesisFX using the link below.
02
Verify Your Identity
Complete KYC verification — takes about 5 minutes. Have your ID ready.
03
Download TradeLocker
Install TradeLocker from the App Store or Google Play, then open the app.
Open GenesisFX →
Demo Account
01
Open the Menu
Tap the 3 lines in the top left corner of TradeLocker.
02
Press TradeLocker
Tap TradeLocker from the menu to access account options.
03
Select New Account
Tap New Account to begin setting up your demo.
04
Set Account Type to Demo
On the first dropdown, switch it from Live to Demo.
05
Name Your Account
In the second field, type a name — keep it simple, like Demo.
06
Keep the Broker as GenFX
Leave the third option set to GenFX or Standard — don't change it.
07
Set Leverage to 1:500
Change the leverage setting to 1:500.
08
Set Account Size
Keep it at $10,000 or change it to whatever amount you want to practice with. Then confirm to create the account.

Step 04 Create Your Live Account with GenesisFX

When you're comfortable with the Octane Strategy on demo, it's time to go live. A live account uses real funds and requires identity verification. Take your time with this step.

01
Return to GenesisFX
Log back in or visit the GenesisFX website and click "Open Live Account."
02
Select Live Account
Choose "Live" and select your account type. Arin recommends starting with the minimum deposit to begin.
03
Verify Your Identity
Upload a government-issued ID and proof of address. Approval typically takes 24–48 hours.
04
Fund & Connect
Make your initial deposit, then connect your live account to TradeLocker. You're live.
Open GenesisFX Live Account →

Step 05 Community & House Rules

AMC is built on discipline, respect, and accountability. No financial advice is given — all content is educational. Protect your capital, manage your risk, and support your fellow members. See you in the screening room.
